title: Trump slams allies as Europeans show reluctance to aid U.S. in Iran war
summary_full: Italy blocked U.S. use of a base, the latest instance of European nations refusing deeper involvement in the war despite U.S. threats of backing away from NATO.
summary_public: Italy blocked U.S. use of a base, the latest instance of European nations refusing deeper involvement in the war despite U.S. threats of backing away from NATO.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: reluctance to aid U.S. in Iran war
